__instructions: Copy this file, rename it to your-org-name.json, fill in the fields, and delete all __note keys.
__id_note: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens. Must match the filename without .json.
__type_note: One of: industry | ngo | public | university | healthcare | other
__active_note: true if the collaboration is ongoing, false if completed.
__period_end_note: Year it ended (YYYY), or leave empty string if still active.

description.en: Two to three sentences describing the nature of the collaboration, what was investigated or developed, and the role of each partner.
description.tr: İş birliğinin niteliğini, ne araştırıldığını veya geliştirdiğini ve her ortağın rolünü açıklayan iki-üç cümle.

outputs.en: Title or description of a key output (report, publication, tool, dataset)
outputs.tr: Temel çıktının başlığı veya açıklaması (rapor, yayın, araç, veri seti)

__outputs_note: Array of outputs produced through this collaboration. Use empty array [] if none yet.
__website_note: Full URL of the organization's website. Leave empty string if not applicable.
__logo_note: Path to logo image placed in /public/images/. Leave empty string to show monogram fallback.
